name: Coeur Mining, Inc.
description: Coeur Mining is a diversified precious metals producer operating seven wholly-owned mines across the United States, Canada, and Mexico, producing gold, silver, and copper. The company completed the acquisition of New Gold Inc. in March 2026, adding the New Afton copper-gold mine in British Columbia and the Rainy River gold-silver mine in Ontario to its existing portfolio. Coeur is in the production stage with 2026 guidance of 680,000–815,000 oz gold and 18.7–21.9 million oz silver.
